name: Sloth Weighted Plush Kids' Throw Pillow Gray - Pillowfort™
description: Bring cute animal fun to your kid's bedspread with the Cheetah Weighted Plush Kids' Throw Pillow from Pillowfort™. Designed in the shape of a sloth, this weighted throw pillow comes complete with a tail, ears and mouth for a super-cute look. This plush weighted throw pillow is made from soft and stretchy fabric with 100% polyester filling for a cozy feel. Suitable for ages 3 and up, it's not microwave safe.
